chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-360 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of main case 18-12-2023 None present for the applicant. Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for respondents No.1&2. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G. ***** This is a date by Court matter, but learned counsel for applicant has chosen to remain absent without nay intimation. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
